chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-788 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 3511/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 16.09.2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General along with Inspector Muhammad Bachal Qazi and SIP Ghulam Asghar Ujjan on behalf of SSP Khairpur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- SIP Ghulam Asghar Ujjan files report on behalf of SSP Khairpur and Inspector Muhammad Bachal/ SHO PS Setharja files his statements. Both statements are taken on record. Copies thereof have been supplied to the Counsel for petitioner. As per report of SHO PS Setharja that after completing investigation by I.O, the case has been disposed of under cancelled C-class. The Counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
